topic: Sauna 4× per week reduces all-cause mortality (study)
caption: Did you know regular sauna use can be a game-changer for your health? 🚿 A study found that using a sauna 4 times a week can reduce all-cause mortality! 💀 But how does it work? 🤔 From heart health to detoxification, we're breaking down the science behind sauna benefits. 🧖‍♀️ Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏 #saunabenefits #hearthealth #detoxification #mortalityrate #saunascience #wellness
